sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100929" key="sunoxuro/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνοχῠρόομαι</orth>, <sense id="n100929.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be firmly bound together</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
